fact: Effect v4 removed Context.Tag/Context.GenericTag. Use ServiceMap.Service with class syntax.
Effect.catchAll no longer exists in v4; prefer Effect.catch and Effect.catchTag.
Schema.decode is removed in v4. Use Schema.decodeUnknownSync or Schema.decodeUnknownEffect.
Layer.scoped was removed in v4. Use Layer.effect and scoped effects inside constructors.
FileSystem and Path moved to the root effect package in v4 for stable imports.
@effect/schema was merged; import Schema from effect/Schema (alias S).
